title: Track Your Board Game Collection
subtitle: A self-hosted solution to manage your board game library, track play sessions, and analyze your gaming statistics.
heroCaption: I created this because I needed proof that my wife always wins

dashboard.title: Comprehensive Dashboard
dashboard.description: Get an overview of your gaming activity at a glance. Track your total games, active players, play sessions, and collection value.
bullets: View recent activity and most played games
Track your collection statistics and value
Monitor top players and recently added games

games.title: Beautiful Game Library
games.description: Browse your collection with stunning cover art. Filter and search through your games effortlessly with an intuitive interface.
bullets: View your collection in a visual grid layout

sessions.title: Easy Session Logging
sessions.description: Record your game sessions with detailed information. Track locations, duration, scores, and add notes about memorable moments.

players.title: Player Statistics
players.description: Track individual player performance with detailed statistics. See win rates, favorite games, and achievement progress for each player.

features.title: More Features
features.subtitle: Additional tools and functionality to enhance your board gaming experience

gameNight.title: Game Night Planner
gameNight.description: Schedule and organize game nights with your group. Send invitations, vote on games, and coordinate schedules effortlessly.

shelfOfShame.title: Shelf of Shame
shelfOfShame.description: Track unplayed games in your collection. Get reminders and motivation to finally play those games gathering dust on your shelf.

locations.title: Locations
locations.description: Manage and track different gaming locations. See which venues host the best game nights and track play statistics by location.

oidc.title: OIDC Support
oidc.description: Secure authentication with OpenID Connect. Integrate with your existing identity provider for seamless single sign-on.

loans.title: Game Loan System
loans.description: Keep track of games you've lent to friends. Never lose track of your collection with automated loan reminders.

comparison.title: Player Comparison
comparison.description: Compare player statistics head-to-head. See matchup records, win rates, and competitive history between players.

cta.title: Ready to start tracking?
cta.subtitle: Self-hosted, open-source, and built for board game enthusiasts.
